questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the RGB color model?
options: A) To represent grayscale images
B) To represent full-color images
C) To represent pseudocolor images
D) To represent binary images
questions.explanation: The RGB color model is used to represent full-color images by combining red, green, and blue light intensities.

questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of the CMYK color model?
options: A) Uses red, green, and blue light
B) Uses cyan, magenta, and yellow inks
C) Can represent only grayscale images
D) Can represent only binary images
questions.explanation: The CMYK color model uses cyan, magenta, and yellow inks to represent full-color images.

questions.question: What is pseudocolor image processing?
options: A) A method of representing full-color images using only three colors
B) A method of representing grayscale images using only three colors
C) A method of representing images using a single color map
D) A method of representing binary images using a single color map
questions.explanation: Pseudocolor image processing is a method of representing images using a single color map, where different intensities are mapped to different colors.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of the YCbCr color model?
options: A) Uses luminance and chrominance components
B) Can represent only grayscale images
C) Can represent only full-color images
D) Uses only red, green, and blue light
questions.explanation: The YCbCr color model uses luminance and chrominance components, but it can represent both grayscale and full-color images.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the YCbCr to RGB color conversion process?
options: A) To convert grayscale images to full-color images
B) To convert full-color images to grayscale images
C) To convert pseudocolor images to full-color images
D) To convert full-color images to pseudocolor images
questions.explanation: The YCbCr to RGB color conversion process is used to convert grayscale images to full-color images.
